title: Craft Tracker
description: Keep track of the things you're crafting
body:
# Overview

Some crafting recipes have ingredients that need to be crafted, and maybe those have ingredients that also need to be crafted. It can get pretty complicated trying to keep track of all that. That's where Craft Tracker comes in.

**Craft Tracker** is a Minecraft mod made for [Minecraft Forge](https://minecraftforge.net).

## Features

* Add items to a queue to keep track of what you need
* Setup a shopping list so you know what to gather

## Requirements

* [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

## Translations

If you would like to help translate Craft Tracker into your language, please open [an issue](https://github.com/actions/setup-java/issues).
